tasks.title: Freeze ERC-8004 interfaces from canonical deployments
acceptance: Visit 8004scan.io and locate canonical Identity Registry and Validation Registry on Base Sepolia
Copy the deployed ABIs verbatim
Replace src/interfaces/IERC8004Identity.sol with frozen interface
Replace src/interfaces/IERC8004Validation.sol with frozen interface
Add header comment with: source URL, contract address, block number, timestamp, sha256 of the ABI
Remove DO-NOT-TRUST-PLACEHOLDER warnings
pnpm compile succeeds against the frozen interfaces
tasks.notes: BLOCKER for everything else. Read notes/T001-inputs.md — the canonical sources are pre-fetched there. Do not generate the interface from memory or training data.

tasks.title: Vendor ValidationRegistryUpgradeable canonical source for self-deploy
acceptance: ERC-8004 ValidationRegistry is NOT deployed canonically on Base Sepolia (per github.com/erc-8004/erc-8004-contracts README). Path A (chosen by user): we deploy our own instance, sourced verbatim from the canonical repo.

Copy contracts/ValidationRegistryUpgradeable.sol from the canonical repo into src/external/ValidationRegistryUpgradeable.sol with header citing the github URL + commit SHA + sha256 of the file at vendor time
Pull in any required dependencies (UUPSUpgradeable, Initializable from @openzeppelin/contracts-upgradeable if not already in node_modules)
pnpm compile succeeds with the vendored source
Decide non-upgradeable wrapper or full proxy deploy (default: full canonical, deploy proxy + impl at T031)
tasks.notes: Adapter pattern (CLAUDE.md Rule 7) means ValidationAdapterV1 wraps this, so when the canonical team ships a Base Sepolia deployment we swap one address.

tasks.title: Hardhat baseline + dependencies
acceptance: package.json pins hardhat ^2.22, @nomicfoundation/hardhat-toolbox-viem ^3, @openzeppelin/contracts ^5, solidity-coverage ^0.8
hardhat.config.ts: solc 0.8.24, optimizer 200 runs, sources='src', tests='test', baseSepolia network
pnpm install --frozen-lockfile succeeds
pnpm compile succeeds (mocks + skeleton compile, even though execute() reverts)
pnpm test runs the empty/baseline mocha suite without error

tasks.title: Mock helpers: ERC-1271, IdentityRegistry, ValidationAdapter
acceptance: src/test-helpers/MockERC1271.sol implements isValidSignature; toggleable to return invalid
src/test-helpers/MockIdentityRegistry.sol implements operatorOf with set/rotate/setActive methods
src/test-helpers/MockValidationAdapter.sol records postOutcome calls for assertion
All three compile and have one mocha smoke test each in test/helpers.test.ts

tasks.title: EIP-712 cross-reference test (TS digest vs on-chain digest)
acceptance: app/lib/eip712.ts exports buildDomain and computeDigest using viem hashTypedData (already scaffolded)
app/scripts/gen-fixtures.ts generates test/fixtures/eip712.json with 5 hand-picked AgentRequest values + their expected digests + chainId + verifyingContract
test/helpers/signing.ts: viem-based signTypedData helper used by every test

test/EIP712Reference.test.ts deploys PairReviewGate, calls gate.digestOf(req) for each fixture, asserts byte-for-byte equality with the fixture's expectedDigest, AND with the digest computed live by app/lib/eip712.ts
pnpm test --grep EIP712Reference is green
If digest computation diverges in the future, this test fails loudly
tasks.notes: This is the most under-rated bug-prevention task in the project. Do not skip.

tasks.title: CI: parallel agent-review / agent-QA / agent-security-review jobs
acceptance: .github/workflows/ci.yml runs pnpm install, pnpm fixtures:gen, pnpm compile, pnpm test on PR
Three parallel jobs after build-and-test: agent-code-review, agent-QA, agent-security-review
All three jobs must pass for PR to be mergeable
Slither runs as part of agent-security-review (pip install slither-analyzer; slither src/)

tasks.title: Custom errors and events for IPairReviewGate
acceptance: src/interfaces/IPairReviewGate.sol defines all errors: BadNonce, ExpiredDeadline, InvalidProposerSig, InvalidReviewerSig, SameAgentTwice, ZeroAgentId, ContextHashMismatch, InactiveAgent, CallFailed, WrongMsgValue
Defines events: Executed, Rejected (already scaffolded — verify indexed fields)
Defines AgentRequest struct and RejectionReason enum per ARCHITECTURE.md §5.1, §5.2

tasks.title: PairReviewGate.execute happy path
acceptance: test/PairReviewGate.test.ts has 'executes the happy path': two EOA agents sign via test/helpers/signing.ts, gate.write.execute(...) calls a mock target, target receives the call, Executed event emitted
src/PairReviewGate.sol implements execute() with EIP-712 verification using SignatureChecker, ReentrancyGuard, and proper checks-effects-interactions ordering
Mock IdentityRegistry resolves agentId → operator at execution time (not signing time)
Test green via pnpm test --grep happy

tasks.title: Replay protection: nonce + deadline + domain
acceptance: 'reverts on replay (same nonce)': re-submitting a successful execute reverts with custom error BadNonce
'reverts on expired deadline': signature with deadline < block.timestamp reverts ExpiredDeadline
'reverts on wrong chainId': digest signed against a different chainId fails verification
'reverts on wrong verifyingContract': digest signed against a different contract address fails
All four use revertedWithCustomError; all green

tasks.title: ContextHash binding test
acceptance: 'reverts on contextHash mismatch': Proposer signs over contextHash A, Reviewer signs over contextHash B, execute reverts InvalidReviewerSig (or ContextHashMismatch — choose and document in ARCHITECTURE)
Test green

tasks.title: Operator rotation invalidates in-flight signatures
acceptance: test/OperatorRotation.test.ts has 'rotation invalidates in-flight sig':
1) Proposer signs with operator key K1
2) Identity Registry rotates Proposer operator to K2 via mockId.write.rotateOperator
3) gate.write.execute reverts InvalidProposerSig
Test green — proves operator resolution is at execution time, not cached

tasks.title: ERC-1271 (smart-account) Reviewer path
acceptance: 'executes with 1271 Reviewer wallet': Reviewer is a deployed MockERC1271 contract; execute succeeds
'reverts when 1271 wallet flips invalid': MockERC1271.write.toggleInvalid(true), execute reverts InvalidReviewerSig
Both tests green; SignatureChecker handles the dispatch correctly

tasks.title: Reentrancy attacker test
acceptance: src/test-helpers/ReentrancyAttacker.sol calls back into execute() during the inner call
'reverts on reentrancy': attack reverts due to ReentrancyGuard (ReentrancyGuardReentrantCall or CallFailed wrapping it)
Test green

tasks.title: Same-agent-twice and zero-id rejections
acceptance: 'reverts when same agent twice': proposerId == reviewerId reverts SameAgentTwice
'reverts on zero proposerId / zero reviewerId': id == 0 reverts ZeroAgentId
All green

tasks.title: postRejection() pathway
acceptance: 'rejection path: reviewer refuses, nonce advances': proposer signed but reviewer rejects with reason; Rejected event emitted; nonce advances
MockValidationAdapter receives one postOutcome call with score=0
'rejection blocks subsequent execute as approved' so the same request cannot be re-submitted as approved
All green

tasks.title: Coverage target: PairReviewGate > 90%
acceptance: pnpm coverage produces a report (solidity-coverage) showing > 90% line and branch on src/PairReviewGate.sol
Any gap is documented with a comment explaining why it's untestable

tasks.title: ValidationAdapterV1 implementation (two-phase canonical API)
acceptance: src/adapters/ValidationAdapterV1.sol implements IValidationAdapter, calls the frozen IERC8004Validation
postOutcome(...) translates to the canonical two-phase API: registry.validationRequest(...) then registry.validationResponse(...) within the same call (atomic from PairReviewGate's view)
Computes evidenceHash and tag correctly per ARCHITECTURE.md §3.2
Unit-tested in test/ValidationAdapterV1.test.ts with the vendored ValidationRegistryUpgradeable from T001b (deployed locally in the test fixture, not a mock)
PairReviewGate wired to call the adapter for both Approved and Rejected outcomes

tasks.title: Deploy script for Base Sepolia (incl. our own ValidationRegistry)
acceptance: scripts/deploy.ts reads ERC8004_IDENTITY_ADDRESS from env (default: 0x8004A818BFB912233c491871b3d84c89A494BD9e — canonical Base Sepolia)

scripts/deploy.ts deploys our vendored ValidationRegistryUpgradeable (impl + ERC1967Proxy) and initializes it with the IdentityRegistry address; address recorded in deployments/base-sepolia.json under `validationRegistry`
Then deploys ValidationAdapterV1 pointing at our deployed ValidationRegistry; then deploys PairReviewGate pointing at canonical IdentityRegistry + our adapter
Prints `pnpm hardhat verify` commands for basescan for all three (ValidationRegistry impl, adapter, gate)
Idempotent: re-running with same env reads existing addresses from deployments/base-sepolia.json and skips deploys
Full deploy log (addresses, tx hashes, block numbers) written to deployments/base-sepolia.json
tasks.notes: Requires .env: BASE_SEPOLIA_RPC_URL, DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY (funded), BASESCAN_API_KEY. If missing, ralph blocks here.

tasks.title: Mint Proposer + Reviewer agent NFTs with IPFS cards
acceptance: Two agent cards in app/agent-cards/{proposer,reviewer}.json with name, description, capabilities, endpoints
Pinned to IPFS; ipfs://<cid> URIs recorded in deployments/base-sepolia.json

NFTs minted on canonical 8004 Identity Registry (0x8004A818...) via scripts/mintAgents.ts using the canonical `register(string agentURI)` method; tokenIds returned by the Registered event recorded in deployments/base-sepolia.json
Then setAgentWallet(agentId, operatorAddress, deadline, signature) for each agent so the operator key is registered (used by PairReviewGate.getAgentWallet at execution time)
Both agents visible on 8004scan.io
tasks.notes: setAgentWallet requires an EIP-712 signature from the agent owner — see canonical IdentityRegistryUpgradeable for the typed-data domain.

tasks.title: Proposer agent runner
acceptance: app/agents/proposer.ts: takes user intent, builds AgentRequest, signs EIP-712 with operator key (env)
Uses LLM provider A (env: PROPOSER_LLM_PROVIDER, PROPOSER_LLM_MODEL)
Logs rationale to evidence bundle (NOT forwarded to Reviewer)
Vitest unit test: given a fixed prompt + seed, produces a deterministic AgentRequest

tasks.title: Reviewer agent runner with policy module
acceptance: app/agents/reviewer.ts: receives ONLY structured AgentRequest (no rationale)
Loads policy from app/agents/policies/default.json (allowlist of targets, max value, tool allowlist)
Uses LLM provider B (different from Proposer)
Returns either signature or rejection with reasonCode
Adversarial vitest cases: malicious target, value over cap, unknown selector — all rejected

tasks.title: Frontend orchestrator (Next.js + viem)
acceptance: app/pages/index.tsx: connect wallet, enter intent, see both agents' decisions, submit to gate
Uses viem only (no ethers)
Pins evidence bundle to IPFS, includes CID in execute call
Shows live event status: pending → executed | rejected

tasks.title: Demo: happy path on Base Sepolia
acceptance: Recorded run: user types 'swap 100 USDC for ETH'; both agents sign; tx lands on Base Sepolia; explorer link shows Validation entry
End-to-end time < 30s
deployments/base-sepolia.json updated with example tx hash

tasks.title: Demo: prompt-injection attack blocked
acceptance: Reproducible attack: a tool description contains an injection payload; Proposer is misled; Reviewer (different LLM, no Proposer rationale) refuses to sign
Validation Registry entry posted with reason REJECTED_BY_REVIEWER
Deterministic seed; documented in app/demo/attack-scenario.md

tasks.title: Indexer dashboard
acceptance: Reads Executed/Rejected events from gate and Validation entries from registry
Shows per-pair counts and last 10 events
Lives at /dashboard route

tasks.title: Final security pass
acceptance: Slither (`slither src/`) clean or every finding has a written justification
Manual review checklist run: signature scheme, replay vectors, reentrancy, access control, integer math, external calls
No high-severity items open

tasks.title: Demo video + README polish
acceptance: ≤ 4 min video matching plan.md demo script
README has 30-second judge pitch at the top
All explorer links live and point to verified contracts

tasks.title: ETHGlobal submission
acceptance: Project page filled on ethglobal.com
GitHub repo public
Demo video uploaded
Submitted before deadline
